env.name: R2_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
env.note: Enable public access on the bucket in the Cloudflare dashboard to get this URL

commands: npx wrangler r2 bucket create present-uploads
notes: Uncomment the r2_buckets block in wrangler.jsonc (or paste the snippet above), then run cf-typegen so env.UPLOADS is typed.
Keys are org-prefixed (orgId/...) so tenants are isolated; never trust the client filename for the key.
See references/items-schema-patch.md to attach uploads to a resource.
